character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Injured and pinned to a mast, takes control of a ship after a confrontation with Mr. Hands, disposes of a dead body, and recovers from wounds.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Injured and wounded, attempts to negotiate with Jim, is shot and falls overboard after a confrontation.

character_dossiers.name: Israel
character_dossiers.biography: Coxswain who falls into the water after a struggle, dies alongside O'Brien.

character_dossiers.name: O'Brien
character_dossiers.biography: Dead body disposed of by Jim, found floating after being shot and drowned.
